identity.name: FilamentOS
identity.aesthetic: The Performance Pro mixed with Grid Borders

headings.usage: All section headers, metrics, and data labels

body.usage: General text, table content, form labels

colors.theme_strategy: Dark Mode Default with Light Toggle

primary.usage: Call to actions, active states, heat indicators

visual_enhancers.surface_description: Expose the skeleton. Make the grid visible. Container: border-collapse. Items: border-r border-b border-border/40.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on dashboard backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.

layout_strategy.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode B: High Density)
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) within grid items, tight gaps (gap-px) for the grid border effect.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow in default state. Hover: border-primary/50 transition-colors.

tables.style: Dense, monospace font for data cells. Row hover effects.

buttons.style: Sharp edges or small radius (rounded-md). High contrast.

filament_indicator.name: FilamentSpool
filament_indicator.instruction: Circular progress indicator representing the spool remaining weight.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
MUST NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Dashboard using the Bento Grid layout. Use the 'Grid Borders' surface strategy where each widget has a visible border. Use JetBrains Mono for all numbers and headings. Ensure the 'Filament Inventory' table is high-density and allows sorting/filtering. The theme toggle should be prominent.
